_comment: Raw VLM inference output for mock.png (qwen3-vl:30B via Ollama). Coordinates are in 0-1000 space as returned by the model. Normalisation to 0-1 is done in vlm_parser.py.
prompt: Locate all graspable objects on the workspace. For each object provide: label, bounding_box [x1,y1,x2,y2] in 0-1000 coordinates, centroid_xy in 0-1000 coordinates, estimated_depth_m from the scene camera, confidence 0-1, is_graspable.

detections.label: red_cube
detections.notes: Solid red plastic cube, clearly isolated on workbench surface. Good grasp candidate — flat top face visible.

detections.label: green_container
detections.notes: Green plastic storage container with side handle. Intended place target — open top visible.

scene_description: Wooden workbench under workshop lighting. Red plastic cube on the left (~52 cm from camera). Green rectangular storage container on the right (~55 cm from camera). Robotic gripper partially visible at top frame edge — arm is in approach/hover position above the cube. No significant occlusions. Background: wire rack and tools on pegboard.
